summary: Canonical UI Consolidation Pass - All features tested and working. Content Studio WYSIWYG with dynamic branding, route redirects, Affiliates/Payouts data tables, and drawer migrations verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Canonical UI Consolidation features verified: Content Studio with 4 templates/4 themes/2 formats, dynamic branding from Settings Hub, route redirects working, Affiliates and Affiliate Payouts converted to data tables, CRM lead detail drawer working. Admin auth uses localStorage key 'konekt_admin_token'.

details: Page loads at /admin/content-studio with 4 templates (Product Focus, Promo Focus, Service Focus, Minimal Brand)
4 themes available (Light, Dark, Promo, Minimal)
2 formats available (Square, Vertical)
Creative preview drawer opens with TriadSVG logo and branding from settings
Download, Save Draft, and Publish buttons visible and clickable
Ready-to-use captions section with dynamic branding data
/admin/content-center redirects to /admin/content-studio
/admin/promotion-engine redirects to /admin/promotions-manager
Growth & Affiliates section shows: Affiliates, Affiliate Payouts, Promotions Manager, Content Studio
Content Center removed from sidebar
Promotions Engine removed from sidebar
Page renders as data table (not cards)
New Affiliate button opens drawer with create form
Search functionality available
Page renders as data table with columns: AFFILIATE, EMAIL, AMOUNT, STATUS, REQUESTED, ACTIONS
Filter tabs: All, Pending, Approved, Paid, Rejected
Detail drawer opens when clicking a row with payout details and action buttons
Page loads at /admin/promotions-manager
Data table with promotions
New Promotion button available
Page loads at /admin/crm
Lead detail drawer opens with full lead information
Timeline, Create Quote button, and Related Documents visible
/api/content-engine/template-data/branding returns dynamic data from settings
Fields: company_name, trading_name, tagline, logo_url, phone, email
